mapper.insert: INSERT INTO host_role_requests ( user_id, request_reason, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{requestReason}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE host_role_requests SET status = 'APPROVED', reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at = #{reviewedAt}, review_reason = #{reviewReason}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE request_id = #{requestId} AND status = 'PENDING'

UPDATE host_role_requests SET status = 'DENIED', reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at = #{reviewedAt}, review_reason = #{reviewReason}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE request_id = #{requestId} AND status = 'PENDING'
